prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-BOOSTERBAG-GRY Product Type: CARRIER_BAG_CASE Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Booster Bag Lightweight Shooting Bag Water Resistant Cordura - Wolf Description: Add the Booster Bag to the core of the BODY BAG for added height. Simply attach it and start rolling for added heights and more positions. Or, simply use the BoosterBag by itself with its hand strap - grab it like a beer can. It can also be used as a simple stand-alone bag for light field applications. Made with highly durable, water-resistant Cordura.

Features zipper access to interior of bag. Easy to refill, add or remove media for customized fit and molding. Search Terms: bean bag rear shooting rest long range rifle accessory precision shooter gear hunting firearms gun accessories field gear flatline Features: - MADE IN USA - The Booster Bag is hand sewn in the USA, ensuring premium quality, authenticity and high performance - ADD HEIGHT TO YOUR BODY BAG - Simply attach the Booster Bag to your Body Bag and start rolling for added height and more positions | Use the Booster Bag alone with its hand strap and grab it like a can - WATER-RESISTANT MATERIAL - The Booster Bag is made from highly durable, water-resistant Cordura so you can count on it rain or shine - ZIPPER ACCESS & EASY TO REFILL - Add or remove media for a customized fit and molding easily with the zipper access to the interior of the bag - SPECIFICATIONS - Core: Sealed Poly Micro-Pellets, Material: 500 Din Cordura & Nylon, Weight: 12 oz., Color: Wolf Gray, Dimensions: 3" x 5.5" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Flatline-Ops Booster Bag Wolf Gray Water Resistant

anthropic.title_differentiation: Water-Resistant Cordura, Made In USA, Zipper Access, Customizable Fill, Shooting Rest Accessory

openai.title_differentiation: Made In USA, Adds Height To Body Bag, Water Resistant Cordura, Zipper Access, Easy Refill, Stand Alone
